notes: v1 kernel is dormant in production. This bench imports it directly via dispatch_marlin_tile_mma_v1.
Linear scaling with M is expected: per-output-cell software dot product over K=4096 reductions, parallelism in M*N grid.
Surprise: M=1 (~115 us) is faster than the production awq_gemv at M=1 (~140 us per 13-D.4 baseline). Software path has zero kt_mloop / shmem overhead.
Stage 15.D-body (tensor-core mma.m16n8k16) replaces the per-cell software loop; this baseline is the 'before' measurement to beat.
